programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In this episode, Pati celebrates everyone’s favorite Mexican creation, the taco. She tries two of Jalisco’s best tacos — marlin tacos in Puerto Vallarta and barbacoa tacos in Guadalajara.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tucson, Pati learns the basics of artisan bread-making from one of America’s best bakers, Don Guerra of Barrio Bakery. This experience sets her on a mission to cross into Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in Sonora’s capital, Hermosillo, visiting some of the city’s best culinary destinations. From gigantic burritos at Doña Guille, to a meat lover’s feast with the owner of the popular restaurant Mochomos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences two important Sonoran culinary traditions. First, on the coast in Bahía Kino, local fishermen receive 'the blessing' from a woman from the Seri tribe before heading out on the water to catch giant sea scallops.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: Josh and Lisa share some recipes to kick off the new year, including a homemade granola and stewed fruit.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Jacques Pepin joins Ming to cook with Sole and soul. Chef Pepin creates a fantastic Onion-Crusted Sole with Anchovy Butter and a Butternut Squash Saute, while Ming follows with Brown Butter Onion Glazed Sole with Creamy Zucchini "Risotto."

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Rick Bayless (Mexico: One Plate at a Time) stops by the kitchen to bring us back to his Mexican roots. Rick starts us off with traditional Mexican Chilaquiles, while Ming puts a spin on nachos with his Crispy Rice Cake Chicken "Nachos."

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto stops by the kitchen for a showdown. Chef Morimoto makes a traditional Deep-Fried Pork Cutlet Tonkatsu and his house Ramen, while Ming counters with a vegetarian version of Portobello Tonkatsu atop a House Rice.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Sara Moulton, a protege of Julia Child, joins Ming in the kitchen to make some family comfort food. Sara slow cooks a flavorful Alsatian Onion Pie, and Ming follows with one of his Sunday night favorites, French Onion Apple Soup.

programme.desc: Return to the roots of grilling with primal cuts of meat cooked over an open flame, such as lamb on a spit and caveman-style steaks.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pelea entre pandillas. El cirujano pierde los dedos. Monja lista para morir. El paciente es un ladrón.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una paciente no puede recordar los últimos 20 años de su vida, pero para tratarla sus médicos necesita saber desesperadamente lo que ha olvidado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre que ha sido destrozado por un contenedor de basura apenas se aferra a la vida; Al mismo tiempo, una monja anciana y una prostituta ebria y gritando entran a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente con accidente cerebro-vascular paralizado observa sin palabras y horrorizado mientras su esposa y sus 2 novias pelean por él.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente es atravesada por el cuello en una cerca de hierro; un paciente está convencido de que se está convirtiendo en un vampiro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente parece estar alucinando y envía al personal de urgencias a una persecución inútil por el hospital; un médico recibe una descarga eléctrica que le detiene el corazón cuando toca a un paciente que está siendo desfibrilado.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre llega a urgencias con la piel azulada; una adolescente tiene dolores abdominales que los médicos no han podido diagnosticar durante años; y un médico lucha por salvar la vida del único superviviente de un accidente aéreo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un devastador tornado F-5 ha barrido el sur de Oklahoma, y el hospital es el principal centro de trauma para las víctimas heridas. Cuando un paciente gravemente herido es llevado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La vida después de la muerte. Dos documentos, un ataque al corazón. Sobredosis de analgésicos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer deja de comer porque cree que está muerta; un corredor se queda ciego de un ojo durante una maratón.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es llevada de urgencia a la sala de emergencias luego de ser mordida en la cara por un perro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un gancho de acero de cuatro libras atraviesa el cráneo de Gail Creek, el cirujano de trauma Joe Eric Johnston tiene la imposible tarea de mantenerlo vivo. El humor del inodoro adquiere un nuevo significado para la Dra. Dee Larcheveque.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente está sangrando internamente por un embarazo ectópico, pero niega haber tenido relaciones sexuales, por lo que su médico debe encontrar una manera inteligente de probar su embarazo antes de poder tratarla.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: The Skylanders realize there's only one way to cure Dark Spyro of his evil.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah looks into a business opportunity, Chelsea gets upsetting news from Adam, Jenelle introduces Jace to his baby sister, and Kailyn and Javi face off in court.

programme.desc: Leah takes Ali for a medical exam, Javi files for child support, Janelle hopes to see Jace on Mother's Day, Briana plans her baby shower, and Chelsea and Aubree get amped for summer.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Max tiene una coartada y Valentina la corrobora. David visita a su tío en la cárcel y se reconcilian. Verónica visita al moribundo Alberto y luego de enumerarle sus horribles crímenes, le revela su identidad. Constanza se abre ante su hijo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le dice a Ricardo que Alberto está en pleno uso de sus facultades mentales y puede rendir testimonio de la agresión. Pero los dos llegan muy tarde. Fríamente, Antonia le corta el flujo de aire y le habla a su examante, mientras lo ve morir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad puede lograr ser completamente libre si se anula su matrimonio con Alcides, pero las circunstancias cambian para Hugo cuando los inversionistas se enteran de la verdad sobre la mina.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo está en un estado de conmoción, Daniel averigua si su sangre tiene el componente para salvarse de la catalepsia, y Michelle aprovecha para acercarse. Arturo recibe una dolorosa noticia.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Los inversionistas quieren recuperar su dinero a toda costa, pero Arturo se debate entre la vida y la muerte. Alcides cree saber quién esconde a Hugo, Soledad y Michelle tratan de engañarlo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides tiene un plan definido para ganar la confianza de Soledad, pero no sabe lo que está por descubrir. Daniel llega al laboratorio de Max para analizar si Aurora puede curarse.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams race to Long Island, New York where, after five continents, 10 countries, and more than 34,000 miles, one will be crowned winner and awarded the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy goes to Raleigh for a job interview and chaos prevails in Mayberry with Barney Fife as acting sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis slips and falls in jail and is convinced by a lawyer that he should sue the county.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents an intriguing painting with an outline of the 'sunshine state', and then creates a lovely beach setting within the borders.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Painter Bob Ross invites you to enjoy the last of winter's snowy touch on canvas, as mountains and valleys begin to emerge from their slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the wonder of a late summer's day with Bob Ross where shades of lavender and golden, warm fall colors unite in an array of fabulous beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a clear day, Bob Ross creates an almighty mountain captured by a clear blue sky - another spectacular masterpiece on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross transforms a zany looking canvas into a gorgeous, soft wooded scene with radiant sun glowing over opulent trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the golden glow of sunrise, join Bob Ross for a refreshing look at early morning where anglers work and thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Something new and different -- paint a wintry country scene on a wooden sawblade with guest artist Dorothy Dent.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints some of Nature's most awesome creations - magnificent snow-covered mountains! Beauty you just have to experience.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful mountain painting in an oval - with a surprising twist! - as Bob Ross creates a lonely cabin embraced by lovely lacy bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A path of cacti and rocks lead right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky, all from the delicate motions of Bob Ross' paint brush.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Evening sky sets in, giving way to a perfect glow -- watch a black canvas come to life under the magic brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading to the southern tip of Chile to bring you this adventure. Kicking off this trip in a town that pays serious homage to the famous explorer Magellan, Jack boards a boat for Magdalena Island home to a breeding colony of Magellanic Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In the chilly waters of Shark Alley near the tip of South Africa, Jack seeks out the fearsome great white shark. Submerged in a metal cage, Jack's encounter with a 14-foot great white is the experience of a lifetime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Help Wanted
programme.desc: There’s no job too big or small for Jungle Jack as he gets to work as a horse farrier, baboon crossing guard, beekeeper and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Horses
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing equine experiences! From a horseback safari in Botswana and a dude ranch in Montana to retirement home for horses in Florida, Jack is saddling up for ten incredible horse encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: At the Serra Canastra National Park, near the town of Sao Roque de Minas, Jack sets off in search of Brazil's Giant Anteater. Jack also visits the humble beginnings of Rio Zoo Francisco, the country's longest river.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Animals adapt to survive in some truly wild ways! Camels equipped for life in scorching heat, frigate birds donning red to attract a mate, geckos disappearing into the forest, musk oxen who don’t know the meaning of a bad hair day, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: While in Barro Colorado, a dense forested island in Panama, Jack goes in search of a Harpy the world's largest eagle. The island is home to the famed Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet six exotic species and the habitats they call home sweet home. Corals in Curacao, Galapagos marine iguanas, Borneo’s orangutans, Tasmanian devils, mountain gorillas in Rwanda and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Nose Knows
programme.desc: Feeling nosey? Today’s Countdown has got you covered with some of the most notorious noses in the animal kingdom. Seven remarkable stories of creatures that use their noses to flirt, fight and even shower!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Cutest Baby Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he counts down the cutest and cuddliest baby animals!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Does having a big brain mean you’re the smartest? Find out on today’s countdown as Jungle Jack meets the biggest brainiacs of the animal kingdom, like dolphins, elephants, dogs, sperm whales, chimpanzees and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack treks deep into the rainforests of Gabon in search of Mandrills. The elusive and brightly colored primates are the largest monkeys in the world, and can only be found in Africa's equatorial rainforests.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his wife Sue are in Montana meeting up with some amazing people who are taking animal rescue to whole new level! First, a couple that left big city life to run a ranch dedicated to animals in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he gets a rare behind-the-scenes look at the daily life of the Maasai in a village in Tanzania. Then Jack encounters Hippos, Jackals, Hartebeest, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon's pristine habitats are prime for primates! Come along as Jungle Jack meets up with conservationists to learn about the future of primates big and small, including Chimpanzees, Gorillas, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is traveling across the globe to bring you his favorite zoo adventures! From Asia's Singapore Zoo to Healesville in Australia, Calgary Zoo in Canada, and Jack's home, see what it's like behind the scenes at some of the world's coolest zoos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a cold-blooded countdown! Crocodiles, Puff Adders, Sea Turtles, Caiman, Fer de Lance and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Some animals have been using social networks for eons, like herds of elephants, colonies of ants and bees, hyena clans and even chimpanzees. Today, Jungle Jack will see what it takes to get “likes” from these special species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack loves elephants and if you do to, join in as he heads to Malaysia to lend a helping hand at an elephant conservation center that is working to save the endangered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the loveable Koala to the feisty Tasmanian Devil, this adventure to the other side of the world uncovers some of the most unique animals on the planet. Plus Jack and his family get a special tour of the Australia Zoo from the Irwin family.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others find themselves pitted against a nasty group but may have a plan to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors is introduced, and although things appear safe and nice, there is a bit of a dark side.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must contend with a new set of issues while out on a mission, and must push through to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Stakes are high when members of the group must go on a heroic rescue mission in a previously known location.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group is spread thin with some members holding down the church and the others on a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: New enemies disregard rules and morals; although Rick wants to find a peaceful agreement, the enemies seem to prefer a more violent resolution.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los habitantes de Alexandría están paranoicos y enloquecidos con los Susurradores. Además, de regreso en la Colonia Hilltop, un grupo lidia con un inesperado problema de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Desaparecen provisiones de Hilltop. Además, un habitante de Alexandría idolatra a Negan. Ezekiel guarda un secreto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl emprenden una misión juntos. Mientras tanto, Siddiq intenta resolver un misterio.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol provoca que Daryl se sienta absolutamente incómodo. Alpha y Beta tienen dudas sobre una persona.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una pelea causa tensiones en Oceanside mientras los habitantes de Alejandría se embarcan en una misión de alto riesgo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe averiguar cómo salir de una situación peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo debe defender a Alexandria de una fuerza amenazante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el encuentro de Daryl y Lydia con Alpha, los habitantes de las comunidades enfrentadas a los Susurradores, que se aproximan a la Cumbre, tienen dos opciones: huir o pelear. Entretanto, surgen problemas entre Eugene y Stephanie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne lleva a Virgil de regreso a su misteriosa isla para reunirse con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete armas que podrían cambiar el rumbo de la Guerra de los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The board of directors of a corporation owned by a spinsterish tycoon appears to be the target of an insidious plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.desc: Jimmy makes a custom kitchen table, island top, and bottle openers from old tools.

programme.desc: Jimmy and fellow welders share welding tips from beginner to expert.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.desc: Jimmy designs a set of kitchen cabinets for his AGA cooker and welds firepit tools.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Chrissy can't pay her share of the rent, she's helped by her cute, clever but catastrophically clumsy cousin, Cindy. Guest Star(s): Karen Austin

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet learns that Cindy's boss is asking for favors above and beyond the call of duty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Jack an impressive chef's post that makes him the unwitting target of a bullying bookie and the local police.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An older woman adopts Jack as her surrogate son and smothers him with motherly love.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack plays cupid to his girlfriend's widowed father, but his arrows misfire when the love-starved older man makes Janet his target.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The roommates play a game of musical beds after Janet tells her visiting parents that she and Jack are newlyweds.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When a wealthy man becomes obsessed with making a reluctant Cindy his bride, Jack and Janet hatch a strange plot to stop the ceremony. Guest Star(s): Jeffrey Tambor

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Three's company, but four's a weird crowd when Ralph Furley loses his job and moves in with Jack, Janet, and Cindy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry's sly suggestion that he and Jack trade apartments after Jack has a tiff with the girls gives lustful Larry the chance to really put the move on Janet and Cindy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: While teaching at his old cooking school, Jack finds himself in a stew when Dean Traver's voluptuous niece, Betty Jane, cooks up a seductive plan to win an "A".

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Accident-prone Cindy appears to have taken the ultimate misstep when she starts collecting maternity clothes, leading Jack to make an astonishingly funny marriage proposal. Guest Star(s): Frances Lee McCain

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise visit by the battling Ropers turns into a romantic triangle when lusty Helen seeks solace from Jack and Janet and lands in the arms of Ralph Furley. Guest Star(s): Norman Fell and Audra Lindley

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack poses as his own twin to romance Ralph Furley's attractive visiting niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets a preview of the great hereafter when Larry hatches a plan to save him from his girl's murderously jealous other boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet turn detectives when Cindy mysteriously vanishes and crazy clues indicate that their bouncy roommate has met with foul play.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack's never-ending schemes to endear himself to a beautiful woman totally backfire, he decides to forego his little white lies for honesty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet find a new roommate after Cindy moves off to dormitory life at nearby UCLA. She's Terri Alden, an emergency room nurse who starts off on the wrong foot with Jack in this sixth-season opener.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry has made his choice for a new roommate and Jack and Larry begin devising a plan to get rid of Terri.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: To boost Jack's confidence, Terri turns on the charm, causing Janet to suspect that her new roommate's interest in Jack is more than platonic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri thinks an attractive older woman's visit to Jack are weekly lessons in lovemaking and, in disgust, decides to move out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri and Jack believe that Janet will have to make it with her dance instructor if she wants to make it as a dancer.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack breaks a date with Janet to coach a nervous Larry, who's hoping to romance Terri with a smooth conversation.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet mistake Terri's psychiatric friend for an escapee from a hospital psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A plainclothes cop moves in to protect Jack whose life is in danger after witnessing an armed robbery at the flower shop.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack must come up with a "wife" to persuade his boss's man-hungry daughter that he's not available.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet fumes when she inadvertently fixes up Terri with a guy she wanted to date herself.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack tries to subdue a drunk at the Regal Beagle, but it's Terri who takes care of the masher with her karate skills.

programme.desc: James May gives Top Gear's favourite warhorse, the Toyota Hilux pick up, one final assignment as he attempts to drive one up an active volcano in Iceland and The Stig rips up the track in the new Bentley Continental Supersports.

programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Shakur Stevenson.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 2004, Bernard Hopkins fought Oscar De La Hoya for the undisputed world middleweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. After a quiet first eight rounds, Hopkins finished De La Hoya with a brutal body shot in the ninth round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, we learn if Leia Makoa can get a payback or will she take another beat down at the hands of Wrecking Ball. Will Lana Star's protege get the better of Stephy Slays? Or will Stephy's indomitable spirit win the day?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's privileged protege and member of the Fab 4, Penelope Pink must defeat the high flying Princess Aussie to secure a shot at the WOW Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW Superhero Kandi Krush wants revenge for her treasured boxing gloves, but is forced to make her way through a maze of freight, upheaval, and senaster mental torture to secure tonights long awaited revenge match against Chainsaw.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Robbie Rocket takes on Vivian Rivera while Gigi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez prepare to battle Jennifer Florez and Keta Rush in tag team action. Rapping sensation the quick lipped BK Rhythm battles crowd favorite Stephy Slay.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's Fabulous Four faction is taking over WOW but just what will that mean for the rest of the WOW roster? Can Tiki Chamorro defeat Exile's Genesis in a singles match as Exodus and Ice Cold stand ring side.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's Main Event match is Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah versus Miami's Sweet Heat in a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships! Will Sweet Heat retain?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Let's hope tonight's main event sticks to the rulebook as The Fabulous Four's Enforcer Vickie Lynn McCoy takes on the frog splashing Princess Aussie! We also see the in-person return of Angelica Dante, who we last saw in the attic of the House of Horrors.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez, has a mysterious new tag team to introduce at WOW. Also in action today in what promises to be a hard-hitting, brawl of a match, Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball team up to take on The Heavy Metal Sisters.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Get ready for some rapping as BK Rhythm takes on The Bully Buster, Keta Rush. The Monsters of Madness, Holidead and Voodoo

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Islands will erupt tonight when Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro join forces with the Tonga Twins to battle the faction of World Champion Penelope Pink

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The action kicks off with Gigi Gianni vs. the high flying Jennifer Florez. Then, after interference in their singles match, Kandi Krush is teamed with her friend Princess Aussie in tag team action as they look to even the score with Team Exile

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy put's the WOW roster on notice that they will have to go through her to get to her Fabulous Four sister, the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink. Can Foxxy Fierce overcome The Enforcer?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tag Team action with GiGi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez taking on Jennifer Florez and Stephy Slays kicks off an hour of WOW. Plus, Kandi Krush has issued a challenge to Team Exile and the frigid Ice Cold.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In tonight's opening battle it's pure tag team bedlam as the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's team of Las Bandidas: Sylvia Sanchez and Vivian Rivera take on The Tonga Twins! BK Rhythm has rapped herself into a winning streak.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is tracking an escape artist who is forced to distract a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress

programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
